creator: agifford@infowest.com
text:
I see a "local setup issue (see apache@ list)" note.   I'm encountering 
the same problem a year after this on a freshly built 8.1 installation 
and Google searches point to this PR thread, but I haven't found the 
"see apache@ list" thread pgollucci referred to a year ago anywhere in 
my searches.  Perhaps a pointer (URL?) with more details could be 
appended to this closed issue so future searchers can find the "local 
setup issue" more easily/quickly?

Anyone?  Anyone?  Bueller?

Aaron out.
